title: A peek into sporting  World
author: Priya
content:
Sports has always been a biggest form of entertainment and fun media for viewers.And becomes a matter of pride and entitlement when it is played in an international level involving 2 intervening countries where 1 is ours. It feels like a battle of war where 1 country subdued the others and claim their victory in an international sporting arena Whether it be cricket, football or hockey when played on a battleground of sports reminds us of those world wars when our country fought bravely and set ourselves free from being enslaved to others. And when our team wins it feels like our win from the long evolving battle and we relish those winning moments by bursting crackers,dance and party. Games plays a very pivotal role in shaping not just a shiny image for our country in a sporting world but also helps in keeping up with a good and healthy body making .

Our personal development with sports

~ We try every trick written in a rule book to keep us fit as a fiddle . We spend hours in gym , take time from our busy schedule for running , exercising and do heavy expenses on buying fitness equipments , in gym but can't give few minutes of our daily routine in games which has countless merit over other means of exercises we do to keep us healthy. Doing heavy exercises made us short of breath , we hyperventilate and started gasping for more oxygen ,face body fatigue, muscle cramps and sometimes minor wear and tear for body with excessive body functioning in lifting , crutches , bents . But none of such heavy weight activities r required if u make sports a part of your daily life.

Some delecting upsides of outdoor gaming activities to delve into -


• It's a restive form of exercise for body to move your muscles freely for a perfect, chiseled body . It may not be a fleeting gushes of jumps and Yanks but a painless daily exercise routine to keep a body perfect in shape ,size and figure.
• By playing games regularly u can be a perfectionist in that field .Can turn a novice to a pro in sporting and can make your talent more revealing to others with u outperforming towards your competitors.
• With your skillful sporting technique u can represent yourself as a smashing player and could set records for a level up journey in your career . And could stood up as a proud citizen for your country.
• Sports balances our mental and physical strength. It relaxes our brain, nervous system and sends a signal from mind to body to calm it down incase of an adrenaline rush out of fear or anxiety. When mind stays happy ,it calms our heart and body healthy.

Our role in giving India a global presence

~ We give our entire life in studies,job and in making career but not even a share of that hardwork in contributing to our country's growth and development . Sports which can give us a global recognition in the world ,a place for our country in global ranking and huge respect and honour to our family , requires some discretionary measures by every individual to be a part of it not just as an onlooker but by playing it at a national level. Do something remarkable and be the one holding the trophy, not the one holding the bouquet. Stop clapping for others and start building a life worth clapping for .

Our Expedition for national level Games

~ Hardwork requires courage and your courage gives u confidence to do a task for a succeeding result. A building is made from small bedrocks of concrete. there is no fast and spontaneous get through to cover your miles of journey in 1 step. We walk baby steps from a ground level to reach a height.There is no leap-bound , no minimalist technique to achieve something in a single throw . When it comes to making career in sporting field we too go through a systemised , pre-definitive set of process to give our country a leg up. We join some sports club/academy , practice there to get selected for a local and district level games , than play at state or regional level, participate in national level championship , play there to place ourself highly in the Federation’s national-level event of sports , achieve good ranking and be a part of their federation , compete in different national level games to associate ourselves in an international sporting club to play for our country worldwide.
Space , science, sports r some of enfield lines of growth and development for a country in which we as an individual can work to give our country an upliftment at a global scale.And working in the field of sports sets a delimiter for us to stand out from the crowd and make our own rising , shining image in hoards of people among which we were once a commoner with no identity of our own.

Making career in sports would yield out -

• A good developing health for our body , a maintained figure and a personality.
• A reputable image in society and an identity of our own in public .
• A name of our country in sporting world with a top global index for our country in the field of sports.
• Many pays and perks in being a national level team player .
• Showcase us as a global icon and make us a voice of the whole world .
• Keeps our mental state in equilibrium with our social and physical health.With our body active , mind alert and place us socially on an edge high àbove the ground.
• Would get world class facilities and a treatment of a grand, princely state-of-the-art facilities at our doorstep.
• Gives us special access in every sector of healthcare, trade and commerce , roadways , in religious sites of temple and shrines.

Sports r a great way to help u in composing your mind with calm and freshness , in giving u a showy personality , a name and fame for u in public , special rights and reservations in every public sector , a highly regarded,well established position for your country in world and in making u a public figure and a known icon among every individual. It can pave your trenches of deep furrow , attenuate you sorrows of social and financial insecurities, give your career a smooth pathway and a future that is more enthralling and forward looking. Our lazy laden steps in sports can set our career from ground 0 to an elevated height. And we inch closer to that ground breaking career with our consistent effort and invested hours of our hardwork .
